zh.lifeSummary: John Cookney於1594年1月16日出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。他於1637年10月21日與Joan Smithe在英國英格蘭維爾爾梅爾可善姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1644年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Cookney于1594年1月16日出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。他于1637年10月21日与Joan Smithe在英国英格兰維爾爾梅爾可善姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1644年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cookney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from a place in Worcestershire named Cooksey, from the genitive case of the Old English personal name Cucu (perhaps a byname from Old English cwicu ‘lively’) + Old English ēg ‘island’.

variants.name: Coxey
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Cooksey  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

en.lifeSummary: John Cookney was born on 16 January 1594, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Joan Smithe on 21 October 1637, in Melksham, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 April 1644, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: John Cookney est né le 16 janvier 1594, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Joan Smithe le 21 octobre 1637, à Melksham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1644, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Oktober 1637 in Melksham, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Smithe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. April 1644 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 aprile 1644, nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cookneyは1594年1月16日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた。1637年10月21日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアメルクシャムでJoan Smitheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年4月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコで50歳で死去した。

ko.Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코

ko.lifeSummary: John Cookney(은)는 1594년 1월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1637년 10월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 멜크샤에서 Joan Smithe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1644년 4월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Cookney nasceu em 16 de janeiro de 1594, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Joan Smithe em 21 de outubro de 1637, em Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1644, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 50 anos.

ru.Old Town, Henrico, Colony of Virginia, B: пэитс фиелд, исл оф ваит, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: John Cookney родился 16 января 1594 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Smithe 21 октября 1637 г. в местности мелкшам, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 апреля 1644 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 50 лет.
